data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Minimizes the time required for users to make decisions by reducing complexity.
data.technical_spec: Implemented through simplified navigation menus and reduced cognitive load.

data.title: Fitts' Law
data.description: Optimizes button size and spacing for faster interaction.
data.technical_spec: Call-to-action elements strategically placed for ease of access via touch or cursor.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Groups related elements together to improve readability and user comprehension.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes proximity principles within layout templates to enhance the logical flow.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Maintains cognitive chunking of content to keep user focus.
data.technical_spec: Instructional content presented in easily digestible chunks, adhering to the 7±2 rule.

data.title: Pareto Principle
data.description: Enhancing key features that provide most of the user value.
data.technical_spec: Focusing development resources on high-usage features, leveraging analytics for prioritization.
